name: Blender Coconut Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except nutmeg in the container of an electric blender.
2. Process the mixture until well blended.
3. Pour the mixture into a greased and floured 10-inch pie plate (the mixture will be thin).
4. Sprinkle the top of the mixture with nutmeg.
5. Bake at 325°F for 40 minutes or until the pie is set.
6. Let the pie stand for 10 minutes before serving.
YIELD: One 10-inch pie.
